description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named docker using the docker:latest image and a docker:dind service. Add three jobs—docker:alpine, docker:archlinux, and docker:ubuntu—each running in the docker stage. The docker:alpine job executes "cd docker/alpine" then "docker build -t mizux/cpp-101/alpine:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .". The docker:archlinux job runs "docker info", then "cd docker/archlinux" and "docker build -t mizux/cpp-101/archlinux:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .". The docker:ubuntu job runs "cd docker/ubuntu" followed by "docker build -t mizux/cpp-101/ubuntu:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .". No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
